title: Pioneers of The Realms
description: Lightweight RPG modpack created for Pioneers SMP, including the RPG Series and Create.
body:
# Pioneers of The Realms
This is a modpack created for my server **Pioneers of The Realms**, or simply **Pioneers SMP**. The modpack changes with each season of the server, where each season is a new world with a new theme. These worlds are collectively known as **The Realms** and we, the _Pioneers_, have the pleasure of exploring them!

Previous modpacks will still be available to download, except season 1 which was never uploaded to Modrinth. 

![Pioneers SMP Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/KVJESuaq/images/34ea30ed1391e41200e40fd3a1aecddc75d7396b.png)

## Season 2
This season we have a lightweight RPG modpack.

The main content consists of the [RPG Series](https://modrinth.com/user/ZsoltMolnarrr), which adds a number of RPG classes, such as Wizards, Archers and Rogues, [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-fabric) (with various addons) which provides elaborate but vanilla-friendly technology, and a collection of world gen mods, such as [Regions Unexplored](https://modrinth.com/mod/regions-unexplored), [YUNG's Mods](https://modrinth.com/user/YUNGNICKYOUNG) and [Dungeons and Taverns](https://modrinth.com/datapack/dungeons-and-taverns), which add plenty of places to explore and challenges to face.

Other notable mods include [Illager Invasion](https://modrinth.com/mod/illager-invasion) to expand on pillagers/illagers and make them more interesting to fight, Sophisticated [Backpacks](https://modrinth.com/mod/sophisticated-backpacks-(unoffical-fabric-port)) and [Storage](https://modrinth.com/mod/sophisticated-storage-(unofficial-fabric-port)) for quality of life, and [Moving Elevators](https://modrinth.com/mod/moving-elevators) to enhance your base.

Key optimisation mods, such as [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium) and [Lithium](https://modrinth.com/mod/lithium), are included in every season to provide the best performance for all players.

## Pioneers Additions
The pack also includes [Pioneers Additions](https://modrinth.com/mod/pioneers-additions) which was created to add various custom features to Pioneers SMP.

Currently this just includes a lives system inspired by [The Life Series](https://the-life-series.fandom.com/wiki/3rd_Life) on YouTube.

![A player losing their last life](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/vpJvbv5v/images/b2412d2fb55c2599ca512f315146f30e73145119.png)

Players are given a **limited number of lives** and are divided into four coloured groups **Green**, **Yellow**, **Red** and **Gray**, otherwise known as **The Fallen**.
Your colour is based on how many lives you have remaining.

Certain colours can **gain lives back** through **killing players of a higher colour**!
The less lives you have, the more you are incentivised to be hostile, which creates an exciting dynamic between players.

Other features include, **giving lives to other players** and crafting **Life Tokens** which are expensive items that allow you to **replenish 1 life**.
